pr.title: docs: auto-update API reference
pr.body:
## Summary

Full documentation audit of `docs/api-reference.md` against all route files in `app/routes/`. Every endpoint was compared and the docs rewritten to match the current code.

### Discrepancy Summary

| Endpoint | Change | Summary |
|----------|--------|---------|
| **Authentication** | Fixed | Changed from deprecated query-param `api_key` to `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header |
| `GET /users` | Fixed | Added required `organization_id` query param; added missing `role`, `organization_id`, `created_at` response fields |
| `POST /users` | Fixed | Added `role` and `organization_id` request fields; documented `201` status code; full response schema |
| `GET /users/{user_id}` | Fixed | Added `role`, `organization_id`, `created_at` response fields; corrected path param name |
| `DELETE /users/{user_id}` | Added | Endpoint was entirely missing from docs |
| `GET /products` | Fixed | Replaced `api_key` param with optional `tag` filter; replaced `price` (float) with `price_cents` (integer); added `sku`, `inventory_count`, `tags`, `created_at` |
| `POST /products` | Fixed | Added `price_cents`, `sku`, `inventory_count`, `tags` to request/response; documented `201` status code |
| `GET /products/{product_id}` | Fixed | Full response schema with correct field names and types |
| `POST /orders` | Added | Entire Orders section was a stub ("coming soon") â€” now fully documented |
| `GET /orders/{order_id}` | Added | New endpoint documentation |
| `PATCH /orders/{order_id}/status` | Added | New endpoint documentation |
| **Error Codes** | Fixed | Added `422` code; updated `401` description from "Invalid API key" to "Unauthorized â€” invalid or missing Bearer token" |

Triggered by scheduled full sweep against commit: [`596063f`](https://github.com/turnup4ethan2/datastack-demo-api/commit/596063fe28cf0211968d1a1e9ec38c16fec75331)

> Generated automatically by Devin

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Verify all endpoint paths match the route registrations in `app/main.py` (prefixes: `/users`, `/products`, `/orders`)
- [ ] Confirm request body fields and types match the Pydantic models in each route file
- [ ] Check that response schemas include every field from the response models
- [ ] Run the API locally (`uvicorn app.main:app --reload`) and compare Swagger UI at `/docs` against documented endpoints

### Notes

- The `GET /health` endpoint from `app/main.py` is not included since it is an infrastructure endpoint, not a business API endpoint
- All curl examples use `https://api.datastack.io` as the base URL â€” update if your deployment URL differs

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/e1d3c088475c4cf5ac9aa388fc2c65ab
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
